summary: Very good recording that could use a touch of EQ, capturing a wonderful show filled with potent energy and gorgeous playing; Set IIA flows nicely.
review: Both reviewers rate this performance highly, noting the strong, energetic playing and an especially interesting, well‑flowing Set IIA. The sound is described as very good overall, though a little EQ would improve it further. Jerry’s guitar work on Black Muddy River (and another unnamed tune) receives particular praise.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 4 stars and highlight a strong show with good recording quality; limited number of reviews reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as very good but may benefit from a bit of EQ; overall strong and clear.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set IIA is noted as interesting with good flow; overall show described as wonderful and full of potent energy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Great job on the highlighted song (Black Muddy River) and another tune, praised for his playing.
